name: jetbrains-router
description: Routes Claude Code's Read/Grep/Glob/Edit/Write/Bash through a JetBrains IDE MCP server (WebStorm, Rider, IntelliJ IDEA). Routing is scoped to source code; dotfolders, markdown, JSON/JSONL, docs/, and config files pass through natively. Primary wins: get_file_problems replaces local tsc/gradle/mypy runs for diagnostics, the project index narrows searches past ignored paths, and reads reflect the editor's in-memory buffer (unsaved changes visible). PreToolUse hook fails open when no IDE is connected. Requires JetBrains IDE 2025.2+ with MCP Server enabled.
